backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the WelcomePopup fix task, linking it to the relevant file, components, and test ID with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing design system tokens, component behaviors, and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind layers and defining light/dark CSS custom properties for the shadcn-based design token system using OKLCH color values.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Luminia Group React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes WelcomePopup, Navigation, HeroSection, ManifestoSection, SubsidiaryGrid, and Footer in a dark obsidian layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with scroll-animated columns displaying brand info, portfolio links, and contact/social icons with gold accent styling.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, multi-layer overlays, fluid clamp-based typography, animated entrance transitions, and a scroll-to-empire CTA.
frontend/src/components/ManifestoSection: Centered manifesto section with a scroll-animated quote, gold dividers, radial glow background, and horizontal rule borders using the luxury design system.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed navigation bar with scroll-aware blur, desktop nav links with hover underline animation, and a mobile hamburger menu with staggered open/close transitions.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryDetail: A modal dialog component that displays detailed information about a selected subsidiary, supporting keyboard navigation (arrow keys/Escape), animated enter/exit transitions, and prev/next navigation between subsidiaries.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryGrid.t: Defines the list of seven Luminia Group subsidiaries and renders them as an animated grid section, opening a SubsidiaryDetails modal when a card is clicked.
frontend/src/components/WelcomePopup.tsx: A full-screen welcome modal that appears once per session (tracked via sessionStorage) with animated enter/exit transitions, displaying the Luminia Group logo and a dismissible overlay.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: A placeholder module with no backend queries, as the site is a static corporate website.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: A custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when a referenced element enters the viewport, returning a ref and an isVisible boolean for triggering scroll-based animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a dark luxury design system with custom CSS variables and utility classes for gold, ivory, and obsidian color tokens, glows, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Luminia Group frontend, defining custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Montserrat), responsive display font sizes, an oklch-based color palette (gold, obsidian, charcoal, ivory, semantic tokens), border radii, box shadows, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for Luminia Group at version 3, recording a known issue with the WelcomePopup component where the 'Welcome to Luminia Group' heading is not rendering correctly, and listing one existing fix feature request (REQ-1) to resolve the popup layout, font, and gold accent styling.
